title: SEC Considering Gradual Implementation of ISSB Standards, Says Agama - FinancialEDGE
description: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has disclosed that the Commission is considering a gradual implementation of the global sustainability disclosure standards developed by the International Organisation of Securities Commissions (IOSCO). Dr. Agama, who spoke at an investors’ roundtable on the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB) over the
html: The Director General of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Dr. Emomotimi Agama, has disclosed that the Commission is considering a gradual implementation of the global sustainability disclosure standards developed by the International Organisation of Securities Commissions (IOSCO).
